data.body:
Danish finds of lead-inset weights of Insular Scandinavian type, likely used to weigh hacksilver bullion. It seems the type originated in longphuirt and/or Great Army winter-camps.

Generally lead with a decorative top made from a hacked piece of often gilt copper-alloy Insular metalwork.

My 📷 NMD

data.body:
【中国語学習】 #HSK5級単語 より

◆ 迟早 [ chízǎo ]
【意味】 （副）遅かれ早かれ

【解説】 「遅」と「早」を並べ、時間の先後を問わず結果が必ず訪れるという因果応報や天命の思想を背景に持つ。
【注意】 副詞。述語の前に置く。未来の確信や必然を表し「会～的」を伴うことが多い。主語の前後どちらにも置ける。
【例文】 只要坚持努力，你迟早会实现梦想的。

data.body: I ran a coffee roasting business for 7 years. VOC’s are not in “coffee”. They are used in some decaffeinating processes. When decaf coffee beans are roasted at over 400 degrees VOC’s do not survive and studies I’ve seen have not detected any.
